author: bPQu
content: Plan: (1) Convert to workspace using existing feature/crossbridge-protocol branch as structural starting point, but redo protocol message types per issue #5 spec (Register, RegisterResponse, Notification, SupervisorMessage, ClientRequest, etc.). (2) Add crates/crossbridge-supervisor with single-threaded tokio rt + UnixListener. (3) State: Rc<RefCell<HashMap<String, HashMap<String, mpsc::Sender<Reply>>>>>. (4) Per-connection task reads Register, validates uniqueness, creates /run/crossbridge/slug/, spawns writer, notifies survivors on disconnect. (5) Tests via tempdir + custom socket path. NOTE: .design/supervisor.md and .design/protocol.md don't exist; I'm proceeding from issue descriptions and DESIGN.md. Other agents are concurrently working on #5 (protocol) and #7 (server) in their own worktrees.
